content: We can frame curiosity-driven autonomous agent intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM and RND) as a natural, built-in active learning system for prunining and prioritizing long-term agent memory, where only high-curiosity unexpected memories are retained in fast-access working memory for SOTA 2024-2025 agent architectures. This replaces current computationally expensive active selection of memory storage by leveraging the agent's existing intrinsic reward signal to guide memory curation.
